title: Arsenal Crafting Recipes
description: Crafting Recipes for RAT's Arsenal Mod!
body:
# ❓What is this❓
- This datapack aims to bring recipes for the Scythe and Anchorblade weapons in [**RAT**](https://modrinth.com/user/RAT)'s [**Arsenal**](https://modrinth.com/mod/arsenal) mod! I tried to make the recipes as balanced as possible while also resembling the weapons themselves.
# 🛠️Recipes🛠️
<details>
<summary>Anchorblade</summary>
  
![anchor_craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/T54LYESG/images/0a6c52a871b68ca400f126761975219fa86f4b31_350.webp) ![anchor_copper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/T54LYESG/images/47cc710f0752679b874d3c6e2091b069d0a9a95c_350.webp)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Scythe</summary>

![scythe_craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/T54LYESG/images/8fbfbf2ff525a50fdd803fb87fd712c1eeadbcf2_350.webp)

</details>

# ❗IMPORTANT❗
- When creating your world, load this datapack on world creation to minimize the risk of the datapack not loading/working properly.

# ✨Other Things✨
If you like modpacks, here's some that I've curated from my empty head for your liking.
